title: 🦞 How to join the OpenClaw Discord-Telegram community - Tencent Cloud
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

This article aims to provide you with best practices for one-click deployment of OpenClaw and various scenario-based applications, such as integration with Telegram, Discord, Whatsapp, etc., to create your own cloud-based AI assistant! OpenClaw (often deployed as Clawdbot) is a pragmatic way to build those workflows: you combine skills, triggers, and policies so that routine operations can run consistently, while humans stay in control of approvals and exceptions. OpenClaw (often deployed as Clawdbot) is a pragmatic way to build those workflows: you combine skills, triggers, and policies so that routine operations can run consistently, while humans stay in control of. If the combination of OpenClaw and large models gives us an intelligent AI assistant, then Skills are its “hands.” Skills can further expand the capabilities of our already deployed OpenClaw. Note: If you haven’t deployed your own OpenClaw yet, I strongly recommend starting from the Tencent Cloud OpenClaw to get an OpenClaw instance up and running first, then return to this tutorial to explore.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks. OpenClaw cron job automation - futuristic clock mechanism with digital circuits. One of OpenClaw’s most powerful features is its built-in **cron job scheduler**. ## How OpenClaw Cron Jobs Work. Cron jobs run inside the Gateway process, not the AI model itself. Jobs are persisted at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json`, so they survive restarts. ## Creating Your First Cron Job. ## Useful Cron Job Ideas. ## Managing Cron Jobs. # Run a job manually. openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>. openclaw cron delete <job-id>`. **Pro tip:** Schedule resource-intensive cron jobs during off-peak hours (late night) to avoid hitting API rate limits during your active working hours. ##### Michael So Shares AI Publication at Hong Kong Legislative Council with Councilors Lau Chi-pang and Chan Hok-fung. ##### From 0 to 1 Deploying WuKong: Standard SOP for Enterprise AI Implementation. ##### Why Enterprises Need WuKong: Three Major Pain Points of AI Transformation and How to Break Through.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw cron scheduler guide for proactive automations
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Cron is for tasks that need a precise schedule or tasks you want to keep out of your main conversation history. OpenClaw keeps cron job definitions on disk and it keeps per-run history separately. OpenClaw cron supports three scheduling patterns and you pick based on the job you’re building. A main session cron job drops a system event into your main session then the agent processes it with full context. An isolated job runs a dedicated agent turn in its own session. A cron job can run and do nothing visible or it can deliver output to a channel. ## Creating cron jobs via chat. The agent can convert that into a cron schedule plus an isolated message payload plus delivery targeting. Create an isolated cron job with a cron expression like `0 7 * * *` and set announce delivery to your preferred channel and target. ### Why did my cron job not run?
